mapper.select: /* wif-das-batch-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getClassificationPlanWaveSeq - 분류계획 Wave Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_classifplan_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-batch-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getClassificationPlanOrderSeq - 분류계획 Order Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_classifplan_order') AS ORDER_SEQ
/* wif-das-batch-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getClassificationPlanItemSeq - 분류계획 Item Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_classifplan_ic') AS ITEM_SEQ
/* wif-das-batch-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getDasMidLocDsnWaveSeq - DAS 중분류DAS 로케이션 지정 Wave Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_midloc_dsn_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-batch-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getDasMidLocDsnSmlStnSeq - DAS 중분류DAS 로케이션 지정 Small Station Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_midloc_dsn_smlstn') AS SML_STN_SEQ
/* wif-das-batch-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getDasMidLocDsnMidCellSeq - DAS 중분류DAS 로케이션 지정 Middle Cell Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_midloc_dsn_midcell') AS MID_CELL_SEQ
